content: Gibson Dunn is a leading global law firm, advising clients on significant disputes and transactions around the world. Our exceptional teams craft and deploy creative legal strategies that are meticulously tailored to every matter, however complex or high-stakes. With more than 2,200 lawyers in 22 offices, the firm operates as a unified whole, and we are committed to providing the highest quality legal services to our clients.
